customValue.fullName: We have confirmed funds available, and we are looking for the right solution
customValue.label: We have confirmed funds available, and we are looking for the right solution

customValue.fullName: We have to build a business case to confirm funds for the project
customValue.label: We have to build a business case to confirm funds for the project

customValue.fullName: We have a reason to request funds
customValue.label: We have a reason to request funds

customValue.fullName: We have not yet requested funds
customValue.label: We have not yet requested funds

customValue.fullName: We need help to build a business case
customValue.label: We need help to build a business case

GlobalValueSet.masterLabel: What is the status of your business case
